steps.name: Given there is TeamOwner with team GroupDeletion on Staging backend
And User TeamOwner configures MLS for team GroupDeletion
And TeamOwner enables channel feature for team GroupDeletion via backdoor
And User TeamOwner adds users Member1, Member2 to team GroupDeletion with role Member
And Member1 and Member2 add backend devices for later channel message delivery
And TeamOwner has channel conversation DeleteMe in team GroupDeletion
And TeamOwner has another channel conversation Stay in team GroupDeletion
And User TeamOwner is me
And User Member1 and Member2 are available for channel participant selection
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I login as TeamOwner
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
Then I see conversations DeleteMe and Stay in conversation list
When I tap on conversation name DeleteMe in conversation list
And I tap on channel conversation title DeleteMe to open group details
And I open participants tab and start add participant flow
And I select Member1 and Member2 from participant suggestions
Then I verify Member1 and Member2 are added to DeleteMe participants list and tap close button
And I tap back button on conversation view page to return to conversation list
Then I see conversation Stay in conversation list
When I tap on conversation name Stay in conversation list
And I tap on channel conversation title Stay to open group details
And I open participants tab and start add participant flow
And I select Member1 and Member2 from participant suggestions
Then I verify Member1 and Member2 are added to Stay participants list and tap close button
And I tap back button on conversation view page to return to conversation list
And User Member1 sends message Hello from Member1 to channel conversation DeleteMe
Then I see the message Hello from Member1 in current conversation
When I delete DeleteMe conversation from conversation list
Then I do not see conversation DeleteMe in conversation list
When I tap User Profile Button to open user profile page
And I tap New Team or Account button
Then I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I login as Member1
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
steps.statusMessage: Login flow did not complete: login button or 'Setting up Wire' is still visible
